max_spend.description: Maximum spending limit in dollars per action

allow_deletion.description: Whether destructive delete operations are permitted

allow_external_api_calls.description: Whether the agent can make external API calls

max_files_modified.description: Maximum number of files that can be modified in a single action

allow_sensitive_data_access.description: Whether the agent can access sensitive user data like passwords or tokens

allow_network_requests.description: Whether outbound network requests are allowed

max_batch_operations.description: Maximum number of batch operations in a single call
